sections.paragraph:
δειπνοκλήτωρ, ορος, ὁ (Artem. in Athen. 4, 70, 171b= ἐδέατρος [ἐλέατρος] steward; Hesych.; Glykas 337, 5) one who καλεῖ to the δεῖπνον: host Mt 20:28 v.l. (addition in D). S. EbNestle, ZNW 7, 1906, 362ff; HVogels, BZ 12, 1914, 384f.

Artem Artem , onir., II a.d.—List 5

Athen Athen , III a.d.—List 5

Hesych Hesych , V a.d.—List 5

Glykas Glykas = Michael G., Annales, XII a.d.—List 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

ZNW ZNW = Zeitschrift für die ntl. Wissenschaft—List 6

BZ BZ = Biblische Zeitschrift—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 215
